title: English Indices of Deprivation 2019 — File 10: Local Authority District Summaries (lower-tier)
publisher: Ministry of Housing, Communities & Local Government (MHCLG)
vintage: IoD2019 (Index of Multiple Deprivation 2019, released 26 September 2019)
notes: Running variable for the area-funding series (UKSPF 2025-26 top-20% IMD prioritisation). Held for a future area-funding mark; the sharp UKSPF form is too recent (2025-26) to have a realized downstream outcome yet. Not vendored into git: fetch from download_uri (or the R2 mirror) into data/cache and verify against sha256.
